goal: Homepage structural rebuild to match the design document. Previous Phase 4 work only recolored the existing 4-tile chooser markup, which produced 'same layout, different color' and did not match the design. This commit rewrites index.html and th/index.html main blocks to the design-doc structure (crescent + wordmark + Thai name + divider + tagline + gold CTA + 3 path cards + deck strip + app banner) and replaces css/home.css with rules that match.
done: Rewrote the <main> block in index.html and th/index.html to mirror the design document's ScreenHome() React component structure. New markup classes: .home-crescent, .home-hero, .home-wordmark + .home-wordmark-th, .home-divider, .home-tagline + .home-tagline-th, .home-cta-button, .home-paths + .home-path-card with --daily/--ask/--full variants (.home-path-card__thumb, __text, __en, __th, __note, __arrow), .home-deck-strip (__header, __title + __title-th, __see-all, __row) + .home-deck-thumb with --velvet/--honey/--moonveil variants and is-locked state (__card, __monogram, __name, __name-th), .home-app-banner (__text, __title, __title-th, __btn). All anchor hrefs preserved: CTA → daily.html (/th/daily.html for TH); Daily path → daily.html; Ask path → question.html; Full path → full.html; deck SEE ALL → profile.html. Replaced css/home.css with 7-section, 332-line stylesheet (56 --mt-* token refs, zero hex literals — initial draft had #fff8e7 which was swapped to var(--mt-cream)). Sections: §1 page background + main shell (max-width 420px centered, 110px bottom padding for bottom-nav), §2 crescent ornament (36px gold radial), §3 hero (Cormorant Garamond italic wordmark 54px, Noto Serif Thai subtitle, gold divider, taglines), §4 gold CTA button (--mt-cta-grad with --mt-cta-shadow, hover lift), §5 path cards (rgba white surface with --mt-soft-shadow, gradient thumbnails per variant, hover gold border + glow), §6 deck strip (header row + horizontal scroll thumbs with M monogram via ::before inner border), §7 app download banner (--mt-app-banner-grad plum gradient with gold pill button). Appended a Phase 5 token block to css/theme-tokens.css with 18 new tokens for the design-doc palette (plum-deep, plum-mid, plum-pale, rose-pale, gold-deep, gold-pale, cream, ink-soft, bg-gradient-home, card-back-deep, honey-grad, moonveil-grad, cta-grad, cta-shadow, app-banner-grad, app-banner-shadow, soft-shadow) plus 4 font-family tokens (display, display-th, body, thai). Added a Google Fonts <link> block in both HTML files for Cormorant Garamond + DM Sans + Noto Serif Thai + IBM Plex Sans Thai (preload + stylesheet + noscript triplet, identical pattern to the existing Inter+Playfair load). Kept existing Inter+Playfair Display load untouched because other pages still reference Playfair Display in styles.css.
affects: meowtarot.com/ and meowtarot.com/th/ — the homepage now matches the design document Screen 01 layout-for-layout. Old 4-tile chooser markup (.home-hero-card, .home-hero-cta, .home-readings-label, .home-reading-grid, .home-reading-tile) is GONE from the homepage. The rules for those classes still exist in phase-1-home.css §10 and the OLD home.css (now replaced) — they will simply not match anything on index.html / th/index.html anymore but stay loaded for the (small) chance another page uses them. Card Library and My Journey shortcuts that were in the old 4-tile chooser are no longer on the homepage; they remain reachable via the header navbar and via the bottom-nav (mobile).
notes: EN/TH parity: every textual element on the EN page has a corresponding TH translation on the TH page. Path note text is locale-specific (EN: 'One card · 30 seconds' / TH: 'หนึ่งใบ · 30 วินาที' etc). The deck strip is intentionally static placeholder data (3 deck thumbnails Velvet Familiar / Honey Hour / Moonveil with M monogram via ::before) — wiring to real deck data in js/data.js DECKS is deliberately deferred. The 'Get app' banner CTA goes to href='#' with aria-label only — no real app download endpoint exists yet; filed for a future commit that adds the actual store links. The hero CTA 'Draw today's card · เปิดไพ่' is bilingual on both EN and TH pages, matching the design doc's bilingual hero treatment. NO JS files touched. NO PUSH per user instruction — local server started on port 8000 for visual review before pushing.
verified: grep '#[0-9a-fA-F]' css/home.css — zero hex literals (initial #fff8e7 was swapped to var(--mt-cream))
grep 'Cormorant+Garamond' index.html / th/index.html — 3 link tags each (preload + stylesheet + noscript)
md5 canonical == www == ios for css/home.css, css/theme-tokens.css, index.html, th/index.html
cap sync ios completed; no plugin errors

markup class presence: home-crescent (1), home-wordmark (3 = h1 + th + id), home-divider (1), home-cta-button (1), home-path-card (21 — 3 variants × ~7 sub-elements), home-deck-thumb (12), home-app-banner (5) on each of index.html and th/index.html
filed: Deck strip is wired to static placeholder data (3 hardcoded thumbs). Future commit should pull from js/data.js DECKS and show the 3 most-recent decks or all 3 starter decks (Moonmallow, Veila Tarot, Velvet Familiar) for signed-in vs guest users.
'Get app' banner CTA points to href='#' with aria-label. Future commit should swap to real App Store / Play Store URLs once available.

phase-1-home.css §10 + the previous css/home.css now contain dead rules matching no markup on index.html / th/index.html. Phase 1 home rules still apply elsewhere (?). Cleanup deferred per CLAUDE.md backlog item 'Dead-weight CSS in phase-1-home.css sections 4-5' — this Phase 5 also retires §10 from the homepage but features.html etc may still depend on those classes. Audit before deleting.

Card Library and My Journey shortcuts (formerly home-reading-tile entries in the 4-tile grid) are no longer on the homepage. Header navbar and mobile bottom-nav still expose them but a future commit could add them to the path-card list as a 4th + 5th card if product wants more entry points on the homepage.
